# Publication Matrix

**Date:** 2026-04-15
**Purpose:** one canonical publication-capture table for the current flagship
paper package.

This matrix is stricter than a scorecard and broader than the retained theorem
surface. Every publication-relevant workstream audited across the current remote
branches should appear here exactly once with one of five dispositions:

- `retained`
- `promoted`
- `bounded`
- `open`
- `frozen-out`

Audit-transition rule: these are manuscript-capture dispositions. The audit
lane's [AUDIT_LEDGER.md](../../audit/AUDIT_LEDGER.md) is the canonical source
for ratified `effective_status`. Until the ledger records a clean verdict, read
`retained` / `promoted` capture labels in this matrix as proposed package
placement rather than audit-ratified status.

Use this file together with:

- `QUANTITATIVE_SUMMARY_TABLE.md` (sibling artifact; cross-reference only — not a one-hop dep of this note)
- `CLAIMS_TABLE.md` (sibling publication-package artifact; backticked to
  avoid length-2 cycle — CLAIMS_TABLE already lists this matrix in its
  body cross-references, so citation graph direction is *claims_table →
  this_matrix*)
- `FULL_CLAIM_LEDGER.md` (sibling artifact; cross-reference only — not a one-hop dep of this note)

Terminology rule:

- use the five capture dispositions here as package-capture decisions
- carry theorem-strength / bridge caveats in row text, import class, or the
  linked authority notes rather than inventing new capture labels
